title: Boonchu 9
original_title: บุญชู  ไอ-เลิฟ-สระอู
overview: The story starts with the next generation of the original Boonchu films. Boonchu and Molee send their son to Bangkok. How's Boonchoke going to handle the unexpected situation in the big city?
